podcasts.name: WEAPONIZED
podcasts.summary: Investigative series in which Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp explore UAP, government secrecy, unusual events, documents, and firsthand testimony.

podcasts.name: Need to Know
podcasts.summary: Journalistic UAP podcast combining current reporting, analysis, historical context, and disclosure discussion.

podcasts.name: Merged
podcasts.summary: Ryan Graves hosts pilots, scientists, researchers, and innovators for evidence-focused discussion of UAP, aviation safety, and scientific inquiry.

podcasts.name: The Black Vault Radio
podcasts.summary: John Greenewald Jr. uses declassified records and Freedom of Information Act research as the basis for interviews about government, military, intelligence, and UAP history.

podcasts.name: Theories of Everything
podcasts.summary: Curt Jaimungal hosts technically detailed long-form conversations spanning theoretical physics, consciousness, artificial intelligence, philosophy, and UAP research.

podcasts.name: Engaging the Phenomenon
podcasts.summary: James Iandoli explores UAP, consciousness, contact experiences, field research, and the human implications of anomalous phenomena.

podcasts.name: That UFO Podcast
podcasts.summary: Andy McGrillen presents UAP news, interviews, listener discussions, and deep dives into UFOs and connected phenomena.

podcasts.name: Somewhere in the Skies
podcasts.summary: Ryan Sprague hosts a long-running podcast centered on UFO reports, witness experiences, investigations, researchers, and the cultural history of the phenomenon.
